# Creation of images for the paper
# ============================================================
# Patient-adjusted nerve-level statistics for RCTD and NMF
# No plotting
# ============================================================

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(readr)
  library(S4Vectors)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(emmeans)
  library(broom)
  library(purrr)
})
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 1. Paths
# ============================================================

spe_path        <- "../../../../../Konstantina/12_Olas_project/Publication_files/data/SPE/Integrated_NMF.rds"
coldata_path    <- "../../../../../Konstantina/12_Olas_project/Publication_files/data/coldata/DE_SPE_annotaion.csv"
rctd_path       <- "../../../../../Konstantina/12_Olas_project/Publication_files/data/Deconvolution/RCTD_weights.Rds"
nmf_path        <- "../../../../../Konstantina/12_Olas_project/Publication_files/data/coldata/NMFcomp.csv"

outdir <- "figure2_nerve_level_stats"
dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 2. Helper functions
# ============================================================

logit_transform <- function(p, eps = 1e-4) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  p <- pmax(eps, pmin(1 - eps, p))
  log(p / (1 - p))
}

safe_log1p <- function(x) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  log1p(pmax(x, 0))
}

clean_feature_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    gsub("[()]", "", .) %>%
    gsub("[/ ]+", "_", .) %>%
    gsub("__+", "_", .)
}

run_patient_adjusted_model <- function(df, value_col, transform_type = c("none", "logit", "log1p")) {
  
  transform_type <- match.arg(transform_type)
  
  tmp <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[value_col]]),
      !is.na(nerve_category),
      !is.na(patient_id)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      value_raw = as.numeric(.data[[value_col]]),
      value_model = case_when(
        transform_type == "logit" ~ logit_transform(value_raw),
        transform_type == "log1p" ~ safe_log1p(value_raw),
        TRUE ~ value_raw
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(value_model))
  
  # Require at least two categories to test
  if (n_distinct(tmp$nerve_category) < 2) {
    return(list(
      ok = FALSE,
      error = "Fewer than two nerve categories available",
      overall = NULL,
      contrasts = NULL,
      emmeans = NULL
    ))
  }
  
  # Require enough rows to fit model
  if (nrow(tmp) < 5) {
    return(list(
      ok = FALSE,
      error = "Too few observations",
      overall = NULL,
      contrasts = NULL,
      emmeans = NULL
    ))
  }
  
  out <- tryCatch({
    
    fit <- lm(value_model ~ nerve_category + patient_id, data = tmp)
    
    # Overall category test
    overall <- broom::tidy(anova(fit)) %>%
      mutate(term = rownames(anova(fit))) %>%
      relocate(term) %>%
      filter(term == "nerve_category")
    
    emm <- emmeans(fit, ~ nerve_category)
    
    contrast_list <- list(
      "NonInvaded_Diseased_vs_Invaded" = c(0, 1, -1),
      "NonInvaded_Diseased_vs_NonInvaded_Adjacent" = c(-1, 1, 0),
      "NonInvaded_Adjacent_vs_Invaded" = c(1, 0, -1)
    )
    
    contrasts <- contrast(
      emm,
      method = contrast_list
    ) %>%
      summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
      as.data.frame()
    
    emm_df <- summary(emm) %>%
      as.data.frame()
    
    list(
      ok = TRUE,
      error = NA_character_,
      overall = overall,
      contrasts = contrasts,
      emmeans = emm_df
    )
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    list(
      ok = FALSE,
      error = conditionMessage(e),
      overall = NULL,
      contrasts = NULL,
      emmeans = NULL
    )
  })
  
  out
}

summarise_raw_by_category <- function(df, value_col) {
  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]), !is.na(nerve_category)) %>%
    group_by(nerve_category) %>%
    summarise(
      n_nerves = n(),
      n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
      mean_raw = mean(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_raw = median(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_raw = sd(.data[[value_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 3. Read input objects
# ============================================================

spe <- readRDS(spe_path)

colData(spe) <- DataFrame(read.csv(coldata_path, check.names = FALSE))
colnames(spe) <- spe$barcode

rctd_weights <- readRDS(rctd_path)
rctd_weights <- as.data.frame(rctd_weights)
rctd_weights$barcode <- as.character(rctd_weights$barcode)

nmf_scores <- read.csv(nmf_path, check.names = FALSE)
nmf_scores$barcode <- as.character(nmf_scores$barcode)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 4. Define nerve metadata and categories
# ============================================================

nerve_mask <- colData(spe)$is.nerve == TRUE

nerve_meta_df <- data.frame(
  barcode     = as.character(spe$barcode[nerve_mask]),
  patient_id  = as.factor(colData(spe)$patient_id[nerve_mask]),
  NerveID     = as.factor(colData(spe)$NerveID[nerve_mask]),
  Invaded     = as.character(colData(spe)$Invaded[nerve_mask]),
  type_raw    = as.character(colData(spe)$type[nerve_mask]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

nerve_meta_df <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  mutate(
    types_grouped = ifelse(type_raw == "noPNI", "Adjacent", "Diseased"),
    nerve_category = ifelse(
      Invaded == "NonInvaded",
      paste0("NonInvaded_", types_grouped),
      Invaded
    ),
    nerve_category = factor(
      nerve_category,
      levels = c("NonInvaded_Adjacent", "NonInvaded_Diseased", "Invaded")
    ),
    patient_id = factor(patient_id),
    NerveID = factor(NerveID)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(nerve_category), !is.na(NerveID), !is.na(patient_id))

# Save basic nerve counts
nerve_counts <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  distinct(patient_id, NerveID, nerve_category) %>%
  dplyr::count(patient_id, nerve_category, name = "n_nerves") %>%
  arrange(patient_id, nerve_category)

write_csv(nerve_counts, file.path(outdir, "nerve_counts_by_patient_and_category.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 5. RCTD nerve-level summaries
# ============================================================

rctd_cols <- c(
  "Acinar",
  "B_cells",
  "CAF",
  "Lymphocyte(CD4)",
  "Lymphocyte(CD8)",
  "Ductal_malignant",
  "Ductal_normal",
  "Endocrine",
  "Endothelial",
  "Myeloid",
  "Lymphocyte(NK)",
  "B_cells_(Plasma_cells)",
  "Schwann",
  "Stellate"
)

rctd_cols <- intersect(rctd_cols, colnames(rctd_weights))

if (length(rctd_cols) == 0) {
  stop("No RCTD columns found in RCTD weights object.")
}

rctd_spot <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  left_join(rctd_weights, by = "barcode")

rctd_nerve <- rctd_spot %>%
  group_by(patient_id, NerveID, nerve_category) %>%
  summarise(
    across(all_of(rctd_cols), ~ mean(as.numeric(.x), na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_spots = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write_csv(rctd_nerve, file.path(outdir, "RCTD_nerve_level_mean_proportions.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 6. NMF nerve-level summaries
# ============================================================

metadata_cols <- c(
  "barcode", "patient_id", "NerveID", "nerve_category",
  "Invaded", "type_raw", "types_grouped"
)

nmf_candidate_cols <- setdiff(colnames(nmf_scores), "barcode")

nmf_cols <- nmf_candidate_cols[
  vapply(nmf_scores[nmf_candidate_cols], is.numeric, logical(1))
]

if (length(nmf_cols) == 0) {
  stop("No numeric NMF program columns found in NMF score file.")
}

nmf_spot <- nerve_meta_df %>%
  left_join(nmf_scores, by = "barcode")

nmf_nerve <- nmf_spot %>%
  group_by(patient_id, NerveID, nerve_category) %>%
  summarise(
    across(all_of(nmf_cols), ~ mean(as.numeric(.x), na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_spots = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write_csv(nmf_nerve, file.path(outdir, "NMF_nerve_level_mean_program_activity.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7. Run patient-adjusted statistics for all RCTD populations
# ============================================================

rctd_results <- map_dfr(rctd_cols, function(feature) {
  
  model_out <- run_patient_adjusted_model(
    df = rctd_nerve,
    value_col = feature,
    transform_type = "logit"
  )
  
  raw_summary <- summarise_raw_by_category(rctd_nerve, feature) %>%
    mutate(
      raw_summary = paste0(
        nerve_category,
        ": mean=", signif(mean_raw, 4),
        ", median=", signif(median_raw, 4),
        ", n=", n_nerves
      )
    ) %>%
    summarise(raw_summary = paste(raw_summary, collapse = " | ")) %>%
    pull(raw_summary)
  
  if (!model_out$ok) {
    return(tibble(
      data_type = "RCTD",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "logit",
      model_ok = FALSE,
      model_error = model_out$error,
      contrast = NA_character_,
      estimate = NA_real_,
      SE = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      lower.CL = NA_real_,
      upper.CL = NA_real_,
      t.ratio = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      raw_summary = raw_summary
    ))
  }
  
  model_out$contrasts %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      data_type = "RCTD",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "logit",
      model_ok = TRUE,
      model_error = NA_character_,
      raw_summary = raw_summary
    ) %>%
    select(
      data_type, feature, transform, model_ok, model_error,
      contrast, estimate, SE, df, lower.CL, upper.CL, t.ratio, p.value,
      raw_summary
    )
})

rctd_results <- rctd_results %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(contrast, p_adj_BH)

write_csv(rctd_results, file.path(outdir, "RCTD_patient_adjusted_contrasts_all_celltypes.csv"))

# Overall category p-values for RCTD
rctd_overall <- map_dfr(rctd_cols, function(feature) {
  
  model_out <- run_patient_adjusted_model(
    df = rctd_nerve,
    value_col = feature,
    transform_type = "logit"
  )
  
  if (!model_out$ok || is.null(model_out$overall)) {
    return(tibble(
      data_type = "RCTD",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "logit",
      model_ok = FALSE,
      model_error = model_out$error,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  
  model_out$overall %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    transmute(
      data_type = "RCTD",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "logit",
      model_ok = TRUE,
      model_error = NA_character_,
      statistic = statistic,
      p.value = p.value
    )
})

rctd_overall <- rctd_overall %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj_BH)

write_csv(rctd_overall, file.path(outdir, "RCTD_patient_adjusted_overall_category_tests.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 8. Run patient-adjusted statistics for all NMF programs
# ============================================================

nmf_results <- map_dfr(nmf_cols, function(feature) {
  
  model_out <- run_patient_adjusted_model(
    df = nmf_nerve,
    value_col = feature,
    transform_type = "log1p"
  )
  
  raw_summary <- summarise_raw_by_category(nmf_nerve, feature) %>%
    mutate(
      raw_summary = paste0(
        nerve_category,
        ": mean=", signif(mean_raw, 4),
        ", median=", signif(median_raw, 4),
        ", n=", n_nerves
      )
    ) %>%
    summarise(raw_summary = paste(raw_summary, collapse = " | ")) %>%
    pull(raw_summary)
  
  if (!model_out$ok) {
    return(tibble(
      data_type = "NMF",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "log1p",
      model_ok = FALSE,
      model_error = model_out$error,
      contrast = NA_character_,
      estimate = NA_real_,
      SE = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      lower.CL = NA_real_,
      upper.CL = NA_real_,
      t.ratio = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      raw_summary = raw_summary
    ))
  }
  
  model_out$contrasts %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      data_type = "NMF",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "log1p",
      model_ok = TRUE,
      model_error = NA_character_,
      raw_summary = raw_summary
    ) %>%
    select(
      data_type, feature, transform, model_ok, model_error,
      contrast, estimate, SE, df, lower.CL, upper.CL, t.ratio, p.value,
      raw_summary
    )
})

nmf_results <- nmf_results %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(contrast, p_adj_BH)

write_csv(nmf_results, file.path(outdir, "NMF_patient_adjusted_contrasts_all_programs.csv"))

# Overall category p-values for NMF
nmf_overall <- map_dfr(nmf_cols, function(feature) {
  
  model_out <- run_patient_adjusted_model(
    df = nmf_nerve,
    value_col = feature,
    transform_type = "log1p"
  )
  
  if (!model_out$ok || is.null(model_out$overall)) {
    return(tibble(
      data_type = "NMF",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "log1p",
      model_ok = FALSE,
      model_error = model_out$error,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_
    ))
  }
  
  model_out$overall %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    transmute(
      data_type = "NMF",
      feature = feature,
      transform = "log1p",
      model_ok = TRUE,
      model_error = NA_character_,
      statistic = statistic,
      p.value = p.value
    )
})

nmf_overall <- nmf_overall %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj_BH)

write_csv(nmf_overall, file.path(outdir, "NMF_patient_adjusted_overall_category_tests.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 9. Combined result tables
# ============================================================

combined_contrasts <- bind_rows(rctd_results, nmf_results) %>%
  group_by(data_type, contrast) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH_within_data_type = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(data_type, contrast, p_adj_BH_within_data_type)

write_csv(combined_contrasts, file.path(outdir, "combined_patient_adjusted_contrasts_RCTD_NMF.csv"))

combined_overall <- bind_rows(rctd_overall, nmf_overall) %>%
  group_by(data_type) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH_within_data_type = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(data_type, p_adj_BH_within_data_type)

write_csv(combined_overall, file.path(outdir, "combined_patient_adjusted_overall_tests_RCTD_NMF.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 10. Extract key immune/myeloid features for manuscript checking
# ============================================================

key_features <- c(
  "B_cells",
  "B_cells_(Plasma_cells)",
  "Lymphocyte(CD4)",
  "Lymphocyte(CD8)",
  "Lymphocyte(NK)",
  "Myeloid",
  "Lymphocytes",
  "Myeloid(Macrophages)",
  "Myeloid(C1q_macrophages)"
)

key_results <- combined_contrasts %>%
  filter(feature %in% key_features) %>%
  arrange(contrast, p_adj_BH_within_data_type)

write_csv(key_results, file.path(outdir, "key_immune_myeloid_patient_adjusted_results.csv"))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 11. Print short summaries to console
# ============================================================

cat("\nFinished patient-adjusted nerve-level statistics.\n")
cat("Output directory:\n", outdir, "\n\n")

cat("RCTD features tested:\n")
print(rctd_cols)

cat("\nNMF programs tested:\n")
print(nmf_cols)

cat("\nTop RCTD contrast results:\n")
print(
  rctd_results %>%
    filter(model_ok) %>%
    arrange(p_adj_BH) %>%
    select(feature, contrast, estimate, p.value, p_adj_BH) %>%
    head(20)
)

cat("\nTop NMF contrast results:\n")
print(
  nmf_results %>%
    filter(model_ok) %>%
    arrange(p_adj_BH) %>%
    select(feature, contrast, estimate, p.value, p_adj_BH) %>%
    head(20)
)

cat("\nKey immune/myeloid results:\n")
print(
  key_results %>%
    select(data_type, feature, contrast, estimate, p.value, p_adj_BH_within_data_type) %>%
    arrange(data_type, contrast, p_adj_BH_within_data_type)
)
```
